text.title: Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: Stripe is processor, webhook endpoint exposed, persistent store available?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; route to processor-specific guide or polling pattern

branch.question: Does the handler verify Stripe-Signature before any business action?

conclusion.verdict: add Stripe SDK signature verification; rotate secret if endpoint was live without it

branch.question: Is dedup by event.id backed by a persistent store with atomic write?

conclusion.verdict: switch to DB unique index or Redis SETNX

branch.question: Is p95 handler processing within 5s of returning 2xx?

conclusion.verdict: offload heavy work to queue; return 2xx immediately after dedup write
ensure DLQ wired so failures do not silently drop

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
